programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A young student from California is looking to jumpstart her career in hospitality by purchasing a home in Aruba that she can also rent out. She's convinced her mom that her business plan is a good one, so Mom is helping her with the purchase. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A Wisconsin couple looks for their forever home in sunny Roatan. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A Texas couple looks for a condo in St. Croix with ocean views to be their new home. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A couple from Texas wants to live a stress-free life on the quiet island of St. John. He'd prefer a stand-alone home so their dog Barley has room to run around, but she loves the idea of a condo where the maintenance is taken care of. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: The contestants face off in the main suite, competing in games for prizes to help with their improvements. Taniya, Ty, and Alison return as mentors to help their teams win the weekly $3,000 cash prize. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: Participants tackle the living room. The three teams compete in an upcycling challenge to determine who can create the best light fixture from thrifted items. Bryan and Sarah Baeumler return to crown thewinners. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the three teams take on the Guest Suite. But as their budgets start to dwindle, contestants must make tough decisions to deliver stunning transformations. Judges Bryan and Sarah Baeumler are back to crown this week's winner. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: The Baders fell in love with the potential of the huge five-car garage. But currently, it's just a hot box full of hazards. The inside of their home has even bigger problems. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: This house is a little bit of the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s, and then stops abruptly in the 90s. The Wests fell for the nostalgic vintage feel but the lack of modern conveniences are causing major remorse. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A couple's dream backyard came with a nightmare of a house attached, and it's ruining their family life. Kim Wolfe reimagines their chaotic and cramped quarters into a home where a happy family can grow, just like the urban orchard they fell in love with. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A New York couple bought a historic home over 2,000 miles away on the spur of the moment, but it is far from move-in ready. Kim and her crew are now tasked with transforming this Victorian antique into a show-stopping restored masterpiece. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: Spanning four generations, a mother and her two sons love their 110-year-old San Antonio home, but it's in desperate need of a renovation. Kim and her team are tasked with bringing this legacy house into the 21st century while honoring its historic past. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: A couple thought they had found a newly renovated home perfect for their family, but the perks were concealing hidden dangers behind its walls. Now, Kim and her team work overtime to confront its secrets and create a home fit and safe for their family. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Brian and Mika feel the pressure as they build a custom dream home for an expecting couple whose baby arrives in just over 100 days. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A single dad and his daughter want to build a dream home and gain a sense of stability after renting for over a decade. The daughter is obsessed with the color blue, so Mika must find a way to incorporate it into the design. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Watch along with Brian and Mika as a family of four has lived in six homes over the past ten years while trying to find their perfect fit. Brian and Mika double down to build a home that they think is just right. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Gabby & Foster are looking to move out of his parent's home and start their new life with their new baby - right next door. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Fun-loving couple Vanessa and Drew are tired of squeezing into their tiny apartment in Brooklyn, NY, so they have decided to make a big move to Florida to be closer to family. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Newly engaged Abe and Miguel are excited to begin their life together, but their home is too small and crowded for them to live happily ever after. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Two US service members lived all over the world, and now they are ready to put down roots. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A family needs Brian and Mika's help building a downsized, custom dream home. But when it comes to the layout, their wish list is larger than the downsized footprint allows. And when their home sells quicker than expected, a new living challenge emerges. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: After 20 years of foreign deployment, a Black Hawk helicopter pilot and his wife are eager to return to their Florida homeland. They now ask Brian and Mika to incorporate their European sensibilities into a lifelong family home. (New). (Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters: All-Stars
programme.desc: A couple who can't decide on anything in their house search enlists Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt from 100 Day Dream Home to act as mediators. And with their experience in the Tampa Bay area, they know they can find this couple the right home fast. (New).

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family looks for a house in Lake Norman, North Carolina. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A long-distance couple is ready to settle down and buy a home together in New York, but they are still miles apart on what they want. She wants an old house with history, while her partner wants something modern with high-tech amenities. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple is on a tight time frame to move into their new house but she insists on having some renovations. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.desc: Ukraine takes on Belgium in Stuttgart in Group E of EURO 2024. This is the first match between these teams. Ukraine has reached the EUROs knockout phase once (quarter-finals at EURO 2020). Belgium's best EUROs performance was runners-up at EURO 1980. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Georgia is up against Portugal in Gelsenkirchen in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. The only match between these teams was a friendly in Viseu on May 31, 2008. Portugal won 2-0 courtesy of goals by João Moutinho and Simão (penalty). (Soccer)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: On June 15, 2011, Vancouver hosts Game 7 of the Stanley Cup Finals between the Canucks and Boston Bruins; the city is a hive of nervous energy with the home team on the verge of its first-ever title, but when Boston stuns the Canucks to win the Cup, the situation quickly devolves into a full-blown riot, an orgy of violence that sees cars overturned and burned, windows shattered, businesses looted, and lawlessness reign... as hundreds of cell phone cameras capture it all. (Documentary)

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: S4E5 - When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become "substitute Kate" and make sure the animals are cared for; a series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he's cut out for the job. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Animals)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: After causing a catastrophe, Clumsy decides the only place he can be clumsy is up in the sky, so he asks Handy to teach him how to fly a plane. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy gets hurt, Papa Smurf asks Monkey to take Brainy's place as his assistant. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy bosses all the Smurfs, so Jokey decides to make him compete for an imaginary title bestowed on only the best Smurfs. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: Where's Waldo?
programme.desc: S2E17 - Odlulu uses the Magnet Key to enter Fritz in a sheep herding competition; Odlulu loses control of the sheep and they spill into Auckland; the Wanderers must find a way to lead the flock back where they belong. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy, Educational)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E24 - Danny Mactrapp has invented a new gadget and plans to use it to capture a polar bear; the Petronix Defenders must swim to the rescue. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: S1E20 - Princess Petswiper carelessly litters and attracts a brown bear, putting him and the other animals of the forest at risk. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Fantasy)

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: S2E4 - The Rescue Riders head to a perfect island getaway for a vacation, but isn't quite what they hoped for. (Animated, Children, Comedy, Adventure)

programme.title: Beep & Mort
programme.desc: S2E17 - Superstar Banjo Banjosen has arrived in Mollyvale for a concert. (Children, Adventure)

programme.title: Beep & Mort
programme.desc: S2E18 - Nobody can decide which club to join. (Children, Adventure)

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: S1E24 - Dog and Pub visit an inventor who has a time machine, but every time they try to use the machine something goes wrong. (Children, Educational)

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: S1E25 - Dog meets a series of animals who try to help him find the Wumpus by providing little glimpses of the creature. (Children, Educational)

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: S1E26 - When Dog and Pug find Granny Pug by a pyramid, they accidentally disturb two ancient Egyptian gods in the form of a cat and a dog. (Children, Educational)

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: S3E29 - The Squirrels learn what a favorite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favorite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Educational)

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: S3E30 - When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own, and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods. (Animated, Children, Adventure, Educational)

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake: Berry in the Big City
programme.desc: S2E18 - Purple Pie Man wants to be the star of this year's Mint Gala even if he has to resort to sabotage. (Animated, Children, Adventure)

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: S24E1 - Arthur and friends support Mrs. MacGrady after she is diagnosed with cancer; Elwood City wrestling champion Uncle Sam shows Francine and the community how to support cancer survivors. (Animated, Children, Educational, Animals)

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Music
programme.desc: S1E26 - The Care Bears dress up. (Animated, Children, Entertainment, Musical)

programme.title: Chip & Potato
programme.desc: S1E20 - Spud refuses Chip's offer to help him on his ancient Egyptian painting assignment, but she tries to surprise him anyway. (Animated, Children, Comedy drama)

programme.title: Chip & Potato
programme.desc: S1E21 - Chip joins her Poppa for Bring Your Child to Work Day; Potato goes missing at the Happyton Police Station. (Animated, Children, Comedy drama)

programme.title: Lucas the Spider
programme.desc: S1E74 - When leaves start falling from Arlo's favorite tree, Lucas tries to repair it. (Animated, Children, Fantasy)

programme.title: Jungle Beat

programme.title: FernGully ... the Last Rainforest
programme.desc: Crysta (Samantha Mathis) is a fairy who lives in FernGully, a rainforest in Australia, and has never seen a human before. In fact, she is told they are extinct. But when a logging company comes near the rainforest, she sees that they do exist, and even accidentally shrinks one of them: a boy named Zak (Jonathan Ward). Now her size, Zak sees the damage that the company does and helps Crysta to stop not only them, but an evil entity named Hexxus (Tim Curry), who feeds off pollution. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.desc: Slovakia plays Romania in Frankfurt am Main in Group E of EURO 2024. Slovakia won one of its 11 matches against Romania, a 1-0 friendly win in Bratislava on Aug. 23, 1942. The most recent meeting was a 1-1 friendly draw in Bucharest on Aug. 14, 2013. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Czechia contests Türkiye in Hamburg in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. Türkiye won both of its two EUROs matches against Czechia: 3-2 in the EURO 2008 group stage (from 2-0 down with 15 minutes left) and 2-0 in the EURO 2016 group stage. (Soccer)

programme.desc: Ukraine takes on Belgium in Stuttgart in Group E of EURO 2024. This is the first match between these teams. Ukraine has reached the EUROs knockout phase once (quarter-finals at EURO 2020). Belgium's best EUROs performance was runners-up at EURO 1980. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Georgia is up against Portugal in Gelsenkirchen in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. The only match between these teams was a friendly in Viseu on May 31, 2008. Portugal won 2-0 courtesy of goals by João Moutinho and Simão (penalty). (Soccer)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A piece of the sun seems to have vanished; the Hubble spots an unidentified object traveling faster than light. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: White dwarfs are small, dead stars with a dangerous side, and they are capable of exploding into supernovas and destroying planets; new research suggests these mysterious phenomena may be the key to understanding the universe itself. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: A special drone uses cutting-edge technology to fly deep into treacherous, hard-to-reach mountains on dangerous search and rescue missions, and a hi-tech ice machine works tirelessly at a Toronto airport to keep flights running in brutal conditions. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: The world's only actual all-terrain vehicle is an arctic mega monster that can conquer land, snow and water; a machine that can climb mountains. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, a 22-ton amphibious mega machine battles the elements to save the day; in the Arctic, the Canadian Air Force relies on a massive transport aircraft to deliver supplies and personnel to far-off places. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: Tourists explore the far reaches of northern Canada and gain exclusive access to polar bears on custom-built rovers; the Twin Otter aircraft drops much-needed supplies to isolated villages. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: Experts use a cutting-edge, all-terrain engineering marvel to access a perilous job site covered in snow. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: Military search and rescue efforts in deadly arctic conditions rely on a specialized helicopter with unrivaled power and endurance, and special access reveals how it works; in the Alps, a monster snow blower keeps trains running in dangerous weather. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines
programme.desc: A helicopter made for extreme environments aids US Army rescue efforts in some of the most harsh conditions; a trio of small but capable tugboats moves cargo vessels through the busiest port of Alaska. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: There's shock in the Bronx, as a vast sinkhole swallows a van. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A crane disastrously falls across two lanes of traffic during construction work on a landmark bridge in New York City. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a community when a condominium complex collapses in Miami, resulting in one of the deadliest engineering disasters in American history; experts investigate and reveal potential flaws in the structure's flat slab construction. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: An unprecedented cycle of freezing and thawing causes dramatic destruction to a landmark bridge in Pennsylvania; experts investigate and reveal how a sudden surge of icy flood water buckled pier foundations weakened from years of erosion. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Disaster strikes a new railway bridge as a crane collapses in the middle of major construction in Italy; experts investigate and uncover a compromise in balance with improperly positioned counterweights and a maneuver that resulted in catastrophe. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: The Genoa bridge collapse takes down a symbolic crossing and becomes one of Italy's deadliest engineering disasters; experts investigate and uncover years of slow deterioration to the structure's heavily corroded concrete encased cables. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: An unprecedented cycle of freezing and thawing causes dramatic destruction to a landmark bridge in Pennsylvania; experts investigate and reveal how a sudden surge of icy flood water buckled pier foundations weakened from years of erosion. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science
programme.desc: The world's most incredible skin, the world's first tattooing toes, and a speed flier that lands inside a moving car. (Science, Instructional)

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts mysteriously die as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why; a declassified document shows a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Life may have been found on Mars; mysterious Moon Pigeons. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Neutrinos are the most mysterious particles in the universe, and they power some of the most explosive events in the cosmos; new discoveries reveal how these ghosts pass through objects undetected and why they could be the reason humans exist. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Gravitational waves are helping scientists explore the cosmos in revolutionary, new ways, and the discoveries they make are revealing the universe's greatest mysteries. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System
programme.desc: Venus is a hellish alien world believed to be impossible to extraterrestrial life; but new discoveries reveal shocking evidence within its deadly atmosphere and on its strange surface, all pointing to a possible future for planet Earth. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System
programme.desc: A look at how asteroids and comets have endured unimaginable periods of time and revealed the origins of the solar system. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System
programme.desc: Saturn is the the crown jewel of the solar system, and using the latest discoveries, some of the world's top experts seek to unravel the mystery of why its extensive ring system exists and if any of its many moons could harbor alien life. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade examines new evidence that could finally reveal what happened to aviator Amelia Earhart; Jeremy investigates a strange anchor found in the Mediterranean Sea. (Documentary)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the infamous shipwreck of the Titanic; locals are baffled when a bag containing 54 severed human hands is found on the banks of a Siberian river. (Documentary)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores an accident involving a Russian nuclear submarine on a top-secret mission, and shocking details emerge surrounding the vessel's design; scientists investigate ancient human remains emerging from a lake in Finland. (Documentary)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Exploring the puzzling disappearance of an Indonesian submarine; the latest research into an underwater phenomenon may help piece together how it vanished. (Documentary)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Remnants of a town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggest a forgotten tale of catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the history of a deadly industrial mining complex. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe; experts turn up new evidence pointing to madness, murder and mayhem, revealing what happened in these cursed tunnels and why it was abandoned. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The remnants of a settlement in Nevada are interspersed with disintegrating machinery; experts uncover an abandoned mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: In modern-day Turkey, on the coast of the Aegean Sea, archaeologists discovered hilltop ruins that are believed to be the site of one of the world's most enduring stories -- the legend of Troy and the Trojan Horse. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The remnants of a settlement in Nevada are interspersed with disintegrating machinery; experts uncover an abandoned mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science
programme.desc: A countdown the most amazing and dangerous home experiments; mixing electricity with swimming pools; racing supercharged golf carts on the dragway; setting off homemade gunpowder. (Science, Instructional)

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Two astronauts trapped in the vacuum of space face a horrible death; the first close up images of Pluto show an alien landscape; residents of Houston struggle to explain videos of unidentified flying lights captured above their city at night. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A distant planet shows an Earth-like atmosphere; a glowing light suggests an atmosphere on the Moon; why there are blueberries on Mars. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed; the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside, and how it controls the entire galaxy. (Science, Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: Using a long-lost treasure map purporting to show the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, a team of experts use the new evidence to get closer to a game-changing discovery. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a $200 million payday; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their warrior order in the Americas a century before Christopher Columbus; experts use technology to investigate long-lost relics to see if they confirm this game-changing theory. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: Long-lost maps offer fresh clues in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant; using the latest archaeological methods, experts retrace through steps through the Holy Land, Egypt and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but instead, that they survived and resettled in the United States; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what really happened to these long-lost people. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal long-lost secrets. (Documentary)

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A satellite finds a set of large arrows in the badlands of the American west; a blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows; a plague of massive holes in the Siberian landscape. (Science, Documentary)

programme.desc: A closer look at the mystery behind the identity of notorious serial killer Jack the Ripper. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: The American frontier is not only full of legends of cowboys and outlaws but of monsters and UFOs as well. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Investigating the mysteries of certain incredible structures. How and why certain incredible structures like the Great Pyramid at Giza, the staircase at Loretto Chapel and Coral Castle were built. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Scientific inventions that are meant to avert catastrophic outcomes from disasters are examined. Their effectiveness in predicting and somehow mitigating the effects of natural and man-made disasters through technology are evaluated by experts. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: A look into how psychopathic serial killers can be capable of committing horrific atrocities. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.desc: Discover if any of the apocalypse predictions and prophecies could come true. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, both designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were designed to protect before being lost to history. Researchers have been looking for both for ages. Did either exist and if so, where may they be? (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: For almost 2000 years, the devout have been fascinated by relics from Jesus Christ's crucifixion, including the wooden cross and iron nails, as well as the crown of thorns and Spear of Destiny. Do these sacred items still exist? If so, where are they? (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: For thousands of years, the quest for immortality has fascinated us with various relics, such as the healing powers of the holy grail, the Fountain of Youth, and the Philosopher's Stone, but they remain elusive and mysterious. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A history of Walt Disney World in Florida examines its four parks: the Magic Kingdom, Epcot, Disney-MGM Studios and Disney's Animal Kingdom. Included: the rides and audio animatronics. (Repeat). (Documentary, Science, Tech & Gaming)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A struggling cartoon studio creates one of the most recognizable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch and through a journey of failure, betrayal, innovation, and guts, becomes an American icon and the foundation of an iconic media empire. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film. It's Disney's magic combination of passion, brilliance, and tech innovation that gives rise to the billion-dollar business of animated films. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first Theme Park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Amidst financial troubles, Disney turns to licensing to bring their characters off the screen and into the hands of millions. Mickey becomes the first celebrity face to grace a cereal box as the licensing of Disney products becomes a lucrative industry and the gold standard for multimedia corporations all over the world. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited Theme Park. It began in secret as "Project X," and after being dogged by personal tragedy and construction delays, when Walt Disney World finally opens it's a triumph of imagination, technology, and a dream. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers. This is the story of how, since their earliest days with Walt himself, Imagineers have turned the impossible into reality, creating thrilling mass entertainment experiences and changing the world in the process. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: In the middle of the twentieth century, a small piece of plastic transforms the world of commerce as Diners' Club, Bank of America, and American Express compete to redefine how people pay for everything, launching the $6 trillion credit card business. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: The evolution of America's most beloved sports of baseball, basketball and football are made possible by the innovations of sporting goods pioneers named Spalding, Wilson, and the Rawlings brothers. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: In the 1950s, rival electronics companies aim to make music portable for the first time ever. What follows is a decades-long rivalry that prompts the creation of iconic products like the Pocket Radio, Cassette Tape, Walkman and the CD, alongside the rise of two of the biggest companies in the world. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two visionaries breathe new life into the hotel industry in America and the world by setting the modern standard for hospitality. Despite setbacks, economic downturns, and international conflict, these rivals will stop at nothing to be number one. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two software executives in California redefine the video rental industry and take on Blockbuster with their online subscription service, Netflix. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck car salesman has the visionary idea to start the first rental car company in America, and when he joins forces with cab company owner John Hertz, they spread their revolutionary business across the country. But when WWII veteran Warren Avis starts his own rental car company, fierce competition between the two gives rise to a new industry with a $100 billion annual market. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Two sneaker companies become industry titans through a decades long battle for global dominance, as they unleash iconic footwear that will bring sneakers mainstream and make them part of the fabric of American culture. (New). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Icons That Built America
programme.desc: A struggling New York actor, brushed aside because of his looks and speech impediment, bets on himself to write, and star in a movie. By challenging the ideas of what it means to be a leading man at the time, he gives himself a fighting chance in Hollywood. At the same time, a young Austrian bodybuilder must overcome his own hurdles and outside discrimination to utilize his strength and power in creating a name for himself in America. (New). (Documentary)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Motorola's first cellphone sets off a fierce battle to produce the most popular device. But when a little-known tech upstart from Canada decides to combine the features of a computer with a cell phone to make a smartphone called the Blackberry, phones will never be the same again. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.desc: Frasier gets a shock after hiring a glamorous psychiatrist (Christine Baranski) to host a radio talk show. Guest star Piper Laurie. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Just as Frasier overcomes his fears about his relationship with Cassandra, Faye returns and upsets the balance in his life. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam loses a valuable dog, and the substitute he gets attacks upon hearing a code word. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff's job is in jeopardy after a romantic interlude with an attractive postal trainee (Annie Golden). (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Trying to be more wild, Reba takes Van's new sports car for a joy ride and accidntally ends up scratching it. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean comes to Reba for advice when she suspects that Brock is cheating on her; Kyra's boyfriend breaks her heart. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Tensions between Reba and Barbra Jean lead to a bar brawl when they have a girls' night out to celebrate Cheyenne's birthday. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Barbra Jean enlists Reba's help to break the news to Brock that she wants another baby, but the situation backfires when Barbra Jean catches Reba and Brock in a romantic embrace. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is put in the middle of Brock and Barbara Jean's marital troubles when Barbara Jean considers a divorce and claims Reba is her inspiration. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Kyra repeatedly cancels plans with the family, Reba finds out that Barbra Jean is monopolizing all of her time. (Sitcom)

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. (Romance)

programme.title: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A Los Angeles event coordinator learns that her estranged uncle has recently passed away and left her a chalet in Vail, Colo. (Drama, Romance)

programme.title: Savoring Paris
programme.desc: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris, navigating love, self-discovery and cheese amid the city's enchanting backdrop. (Romance)

programme.title: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: Fiona (Lacey Chabert), a New York City real estate broker, retreats to her family's quaint Vermont inn after being dumped by her boyfriend, Nate (Jesse Moss). When Nate shows up at the inn with a new girlfriend, Fiona devises a plan to win him back. (Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Two Scoops of Italy
programme.desc: When an American chef travels to a quaint village in Italy, she falls in love with the flavors, the culture, and the gentleman who helped her discover it all. (Romance)

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: A speech writer makes a deal with his ex-girlfriend to pretend they are a couple to save his family's Christmas. It's not long before both the ruse and their feelings catch up with them. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly
programme.desc: Emily comes home to visit her parents, only to discover they're leaving for a trip of their own. While staying at their house for the holidays, Emily meets members of the community who want her to join in the neighborhood's Christmas festivities. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: 'Tis the Season to Be Merry
programme.desc: Looking for a fresh angle for her book on relationships, Merry heads to snow-covered Vermont. She soon finds a new perspective and Christmas cheer when she meets a charismatic aid worker named Chris. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Noel Next Door
programme.desc: A single mother gets into a war of words with an irritable neighbor who is ruining Christmas, only to find that this misunderstood Grinch is the man who has stolen her heart. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Navigating Christmas
programme.desc: Recently divorced Melanie and her son Jason visit a remote island for Christmas, only to find themselves running a real working lighthouse where she connects with the curt but cute owner. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: A Christmas Cookie Catastrophe
programme.desc: Sparks fly between the new CEO of a small-town cookie company and the owner of a local bakery as they try to recreate a stolen secret recipe. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas by Design
programme.desc: A fashion designer learns what's most important in life when she joins a Christmas challenge to create a new holiday-themed collection. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: A Cozy Christmas Inn
programme.desc: A real estate executive travels to Alaska during the holidays to acquire a bed-and-breakfast, only to discover it's owned by her ex. She's soon falling in love with the town and quite possibly him all over again. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: After a surprising breakup with her boyfriend, a travel writer decides to go on the picturesque Christmas vacation planned for the two of them, alone. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Flipping for Christmas
programme.desc: It's almost Christmas when busy realtor Abigail agrees to help her sister with the simple flip of a recently inherited home. Unfortunately, co-beneficiary Bo has other plans in mind. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job as a maid at a ritzy New York City hotel, a woman accepts a temporary job as governess to a young girl who is part of a powerful European family. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A struggling pastry chef is thrilled to learn that she has made it to the finals of the American Gingerbread Competition, but distractions in her love life threaten to derail her dreams of taking home the grand prize. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Falling Like Snowflakes
programme.desc: Determined to capture a rare shot of a 12-sided snowflake, a photographer enlists help from a childhood friend as they go on a mission they'll never forget. (Romance)

programme.title: Cross Country Christmas
programme.desc: When a snowstorm disrupts both Lina's and Max's holiday plans, they realize they must work together to find a way home -- without taking it out on each other. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric Randall, an author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays. Unsure of himself, Eric turns to his neighbor April, a lover of all things Christmas, for help. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: Lisa's trip home to Evergreen for the holidays finds her shepherding an effort to save the town's beloved general store, fulfilling the wishes of a Christmas past and finding a romance full of Christmas magic. (Drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: Aria hopes being selected for Sterling Masters' Big Holiday Adventure will save Christmas in Midway. Little does she know that Alex Bartlett is the voice behind Sterling Masters. (Drama, Romance)

programme.title: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: As maid of honor for her best friend Ava, cynical interior designer Lacey is tasked with decorating a honeymoon cottage for the newlyweds. Although it's a simple enough task, she didn't plan on being snowed in with the bride-to-be's sexy brother. (Drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Next Stop, Christmas
programme.desc: Angie wonders what life would be like if she had married an ex who became famous. When she finds herself magically transported into the past, Angie has the chance to relive that Christmas and learn what (and who) is truly important to her. (Fantasy, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: The queen (Jane Seymour) of Cordinia schemes to break up her royal son's (Stephen Hagan) romance with a seamstress (Lacey Chabert) from Philadelphia. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: When an architect finds himself hosting his family for Christmas, he turns to a holiday coordinator for help. Her expert Christmas spirit brings his family together, but neither expected it to bring them closer to each other. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Coyote Creek Christmas
programme.desc: An event planner discovers Christmas magic with a charming father-son duo while throwing a themed Christmas party at her family's inn. (Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A photographer returns home to take care of her grandmother and gets involved with helping a neighbor look after his young nephew. (Drama, Holiday, Romance)

programme.title: Falling Like Snowflakes
programme.desc: Determined to capture a rare shot of a 12-sided snowflake, a photographer enlists help from a childhood friend as they go on a mission they'll never forget. (Romance)

programme.title: A Biltmore Christmas
programme.desc: A magical hourglass sends modern-day screenwriter Lucy Hardgrove to the set of the 1947 holiday movie classic "His Merry Wife!" However, before she can return to the present, Lucy must make things right or threaten to alter the future forever. (Fantasy, Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Never Kiss a Man in a Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: A single mom faces Christmas alone until a stranger crashes into her life and becomes an unexpected houseguest. (Holiday, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: When Darcy returns to her hometown for Christmas, and she reconnects with Luke, a former rival, they must plan a charity event together. As she spends time with her family and Luke, she starts to realize what matters most in life. (Comedy, Holiday, Romance)

programme.desc: Once upon a time, in a far away swamp, there lived an ogre named Shrek (Mike Myers) whose precious solitude is suddenly shattered by an invasion of annoying fairy tale characters. They were all banished from their kingdom by the evil Lord Farquaad (John Lithgow). Determined to save their home -- not to mention his -- Shrek cuts a deal with Farquaad and sets out to rescue Princess Fiona (Cameron Diaz) to be Farquaad's bride. Rescuing the Princess may be small compared to her deep, dark secret. (Animated, Children, Comedy, Fantasy)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S10E10 - Kardea Brown gets the family together for a steakhouse supper and prepares cold deviled crab dip, spice rubbed rib-eye steaks with frizzled onions, broccoli and cheese twice baked potatoes and buttercake with macerated berries and whipped cream. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites some friends over for a classic Southern oyster roast with a light and hearty makeover; she prepares roasted oysters with Thai chili mignonette, crab rangoon wonton cups, easy Brunswick stew and slow cooker black cherry cobbler. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S8E3 - Kardea Brown is firing up the grill for everything from dinner to dessert; Korean-style short ribs with a loaded grilled potato and grilled Brussels sprouts salad; Bryon's mini peach dump cakes are also made on the grill. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S10E8 - Kardea Brown hosts an end-of-summer barbecue and serves steak burgers with hot pepper bacon jam and beer cheese, grilled corn with garlic butter, spicy sausage baked beans and homemade pineapple whip with toasted coconut and macadamia nuts. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E4 - Ree Drummond celebrates her late father-in-law with his favorite recipes; she honors his chocoholic lifestyle with skillet chocolate cakes before making biscuits and sausage pepper gravy, tenderloin steak bite and shrimp brochette jalapeno poppers. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E5 - Ree Drummond makes super-fast sweets with easy shortcuts; she stacks a showstopping layered tiramisu cake, serves up a stunning sticky bun crinkle cake, creates a charming cherry chocolate mug cake and scoops fruity blackberry lemon ice cream. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E1 - Ree Drummond puts a spin on recipes with her surf and turf skillet, spiced chicken sheet pan supper, mushroom and squash fajita bowls with cilantro-lime cauliflower rice and Tex-Mex toppings, and whipped cottage cheese with roasted berries. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E6 - Ree Drummond shares simple takes on comfort classics; she spices up Tex-Mex chicken fried steak, puts a speedy spin on pesto chicken lasagna skillet, gives cream of celery soup a retro vibe, and adds luxury to white chocolate hot chocolate. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E7 - Ree Drummond shares perfectly portioned meals for two. She has one-pan Apple Cider Pork Chops, speedy Easy Corn Pasta, extra comforting Meatloaf Patties and a shortcut side of Instant Cheesy Mash that's good enough for company. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E1 - Ree Drummond hosts a Q&A with questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska while she makes a party ready epic dip platter; she spills the secrets on her speedy hamburger soup, easy tomato cream pasta and 3-ingredient sausage casserole. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: S2E10 - The two remaining chefs are stunned when some unwelcome guests arrive at the villa; Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini choose the winner of "Ciao House." (Competition Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Guy's All-American Road Trip

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S21E11 - In Baltimore, wicked wings and a killer steak wrap; in Eugene, Ore., a soul food joint smoking barbecue bird and their signature burger; in Des Moines, Iowa, fried chicken and decadent red velvet waffles. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S25E4 - In Minneapolis, a brewery cooks up dishes like righteous pulled pork and a killer brisket sandwich; in Miami, southern favorites like hen and dumplings and a lamb belly BLT; in Los Angeles, a mega-meat pizza and wild boar gnocchi. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S21E13 - In Des Moines, Iowa, a nearly century-old chili recipe; in Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint serving up fresh catch since the 1930s; in Brigantine, N.J., a butcher shop cranking out righteous homemade sausage and real deal jerky. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: S43E10 - Guy Fieri dives into a meaty smorgasbord, starting with a funky Nashville joint that serves a skyscraper burger; in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., a chef cooks up real deal gnocchi, and an out-of-this-world spot goes huge with a monster pork chop. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: 48 Hours ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode.
